loop_standard.rule: Loop registry only points to loop roots. Loop-specific rules, queue, state, runs and outputs live inside each loop directory.

loops.name: 知识分类体系逐项打磨循环

module_boundary.role: 系统级循环编排模块，登记和治理所有稳定、可重复、可暂停、可恢复的人工/agent 协作循环。
owns: loop registry and durable loop discovery
loop lifecycle status, queue, state, run logs and outputs contract
handoff intake from review, diagnostics, taxonomy and future system modules
legacy loop adoption and visual coverage requirement for important loops
does_not_own: the domain knowledge truth produced by a loop
root-cause diagnosis after a confirmed failure
visual layout aesthetics of Canvas views
unattended multi-loop scheduler until explicitly introduced as a runtime service

adoption_policy.rule: 新增或升格 loop-orchestration 后，必须接管旧 loop 资产；旧 loop 只能被 adopt、migrate、archive、deprecate、exempt_with_reason 或 queue_follow_up，不能无人负责。
